description: XD-2 §8 scenario 2: backend emits turn.error{retriable:true}. Client replays the SAME turnId. Server must dedup — only one logical turn is processed; provider calls happen at most once across the two attempts; final TripPlan is identical to a clean single-attempt run.

messages.content: Book a weekend in Barcelona from Madrid for one person, mid-range hotel, leaving Friday returning Sunday.
